client_id.description: Your Listrak API client ID. Find this on the setup tab of your Segment integration under Integrations > Integrations Management in https://admin.listrak.com.
client_id.label: API Client ID

client_secret.description: Your Lisrak API client secret. Find this on the setup tab of your Segment integration under Integrations > Integrations Management in https://admin.listrak.com.
client_secret.label: API Client Secret

oauth.description: Authorizes Segment to OAuth to the Destination API
oauth.label: OAuth

access-token.description: The (legacy) access token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

access_token.description: The access token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

appId.description: The App ID, retrieved via Destination API post-auth.

appName.description: The authorized user App, retrieved via Destination API on settings view load.

createdBy.description: Email address of segment user who connected OAuth.

displayName.description: The authorized user, retrieved via Destination API on settings view load.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

actions.name: Update Email Contact Profile Fields
actions.description: One or more list imports will be started to update the specified contact profile fields on the specified list.

fields.label: List ID
fields.description: Identifier used to locate the list. Find this under Help & Support > API ID Information in https://admin.listrak.com.

listId.title: List ID
listId.description: Identifier used to locate the list. Find this under Help & Support > API ID Information in https://admin.listrak.com.

fields.label: Profile Field Values
fields.description: Add one or more profile field IDs as object keys. You can find these IDs under Help & Support > API ID Information on https://admin.listrak.com. Choose one of three options as the object value: "on" (activates this field in Listrak), "off" (deactivates this field in Listrak), or "useAudienceKey" (Listrak sets the field based on the Segment Audience payload's audience_key boolean value: "true" activates the field, "false" deactivates it).

profileFieldValues.title: Profile Field Values
profileFieldValues.description: Add one or more profile field IDs as object keys. You can find these IDs under Help & Support > API ID Information on https://admin.listrak.com. Choose one of three options as the object value: "on" (activates this field in Listrak), "off" (deactivates this field in Listrak), or "useAudienceKey" (Listrak sets the field based on the Segment Audience payload's audience_key boolean value: "true" activates the field, "false" deactivates it).

fields.label: Traits or properties object
fields.description: A computed object for track and identify events. This field should not need to be edited.

traits_or_props.title: Traits or properties object
traits_or_props.description: A computed object for track and identify events. This field should not need to be edited.

fields.label: Audience Key
fields.description: Segment Audience Key to which user identifier should be added or removed.

segment_audience_key.title: Audience Key
segment_audience_key.description: Segment Audience Key to which user identifier should be added or removed.

fields.label: Batch Data to Listrak
fields.description: When enabled, multiple events will be sent to Listrak in a single request, which is recommended for optimal performance.

enable_batching.title: Batch Data to Listrak
enable_batching.description: When enabled, multiple events will be sent to Listrak in a single request, which is recommended for optimal performance.
